$$ \log_{7x}2023 \cdot \log_{289x}2023 = \log_{2023x}2023 $$

| :--- | :--- |

| **Python_Coder_Tool** | **Secondary Tool:** Once the algebraic solution is derived, Python is ideal for verifying the roots numerically, handling floating-point precision issues, and formatting the final answer. It is also useful for symbolic computation if the equation were more complex. |
